findings.description: Test-coverage regression on ui_decode_session_status_ntf. VERIFIED FIXED: a replacement test was added in tests/test_analyzer_dispatch.c. emit_session_status_ui_decoder (line 155) calls ui_decode_session_status_ntf directly (line 163), and the session_status_ui_decoder_smoke case (lines 360-383) asserts the SESSION_STATUS_NTF header, session token (0x12345678), ACTIVE state label/description, and reason label/description. grep confirms tests/ now references the live decoder again. Build + run confirmed: analyzer_dispatch suite passes 5/5, including session_status_ui_decoder_smoke. The live SESSION_STATUS_NTF decoder once again has regression coverage.

Non-atomic changeset. NOT FIXED: the developer explicitly accepted the finding but performed no code/changeset action ('accepted_not_code_fixed', diff empty). git status still shows the same unrelated, inseparable edits and deletions bundled with Phase 2.2: M Makefile, M docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, D include/uci_packet_structures.h, D src/uci_packet_structures.c, D tests/test_packet_structures.c. The build still only passes because the Makefile drops those sources. The changeset must be split into separate commits / the unrelated files isolated before merge.

summary: 1 of 2 points resolved. Finding 1 (MEDIUM, test coverage for ui_decode_session_status_ntf) is RESOLVED and independently verified: the new session_status_ui_decoder_smoke test directly exercises the live decoder and passes (5/5 in the analyzer_dispatch suite). Finding 2 (LOW, non-atomic changeset) is NOT_ADDRESSED: the developer acknowledged but explicitly declined to act, and the working tree still conflates the dead-decoder removal with unrelated packet-structures/Makefile/docs changes. Because one point remains unaddressed, the verdict is REJECT.
